case_title: HAYGOOD,TAMMY B.LAW OFFICES OF TAMMY B.HAYGOOD VS DANAHAN, KEVERNE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYGOOD,TAMMY B.LAW OFFICES OF TAMMY B.HAYGOOD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANAHAN, KEVERNE $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $245.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
